title: Reconcile detached tmux sessions safely
goal: Classify all detached Heim-PC tmux sessions against live processes, repository state, active leases and recoverable transcripts, then close only terminal idle shells through a reviewed allowlist without losing active agent work.

acceptance.assertion: Every tmux session is inventoried with name, age, attach state, pane command, process tree, working directory, repository/branch where applicable and active lease/task references.
Each session is classified as active-retain, uncertain-retain, terminal-archive or safe-close; age or detached state alone never authorizes termination.
Before any safe-close action, bounded pane history and session metadata are stored in a timestamped digest-manifested quarantine outside the tmux socket path.

Apply mode accepts only explicit reviewed session names and refuses attached sessions, sessions with non-shell foreground processes, sessions with active leases/tasks or sessions whose process tree changed since review.
After effects, tmux session counts, preserved active sessions and related services are re-read; no unrelated process or repository is changed.

metadata.live_finding: 59 detached sessions; 54 inactive for more than 24 hours and 38 for more than 72 hours, including both plain shells and Claude/agent processes.
metadata.outcome: Inventoried all 59 detached tmux sessions, retained 27 active and 3 uncertain/young sessions, archived bounded pane history for 29 process-fingerprint-bound idle shells, and closed exactly those 29 sessions. Repositories and worktrees were unchanged; 30 protected sessions and core operator services remained active.

verified_acceptance.inventory: The dry-run records every session and pane with age, attach state, command, cwd, process tree, fingerprint, active leases and repository-agent context.
verified_acceptance.classification: 59 sessions were classified as 29 safe-close, 27 active-retain and 3 uncertain-retain. Age alone was explicitly non-authorizing.
verified_acceptance.transcript-preservation: Before effects, up to 5000 pane-history lines per safe-close session were stored locally as 29 mode-0600 files with individual hashes in the apply plan.
verified_acceptance.explicit-allowlist: Only exact names in the reviewed 29-session allowlist were closed. Every session was detached, single-pane, bash-only apart from the session logger, older than 24 hours, unleased and fingerprint-identical immediately before kill-session.
verified_acceptance.post-proof: All 29 allowlisted sessions are absent; all 30 protected sessions remain. Grabowski operator, tunnel and Leitstand user services remained active. No repository or worktree was removed or modified.

metadata.self_review: PASS: process fingerprints were checked twice, repository candidates were clean with no open PR or Bureau branch reference, active repo leases and agent-session repositories were retained, histories were archived before exact-name close, and protected sessions remained.
